answer:
**In the Yājñavalkya Smṛti (Chapter 1, verse 1.115 and immediate context), there is no direct prescription about the wife's duties.**[^1][^2]

This verse falls within the section on the duties of a householder (gṛhasthadharmaprakaraṇam, starting at 1.97). It advises rising at the Brāhma muhūrta (roughly 96 minutes before sunrise) to reflect on one's welfare, while balancing *dharma*, artha (wealth), and kāma (desire) according to ability.[^1] The preceding verse (1.114) describes the householder's evening routine: twilight worship, fire oblations, eating without excess, and retiring to bed.[^2] The following verse (1.116) concerns honoring people based on learning, virtue, age, etc.[^3]

**Duties of wives (*patnīdharmāḥ*) are prescribed earlier in Chapter 1 (vivāhaprakaraṇam and related sections, verses ~70–89),** including obedience to the husband as the highest *dharma* for women (1.77);[^4] managing household utensils, being skillful/cheerful/economical/devoted to the husband, and saluting in-laws (1.83);[^5] renouncing adornment/socializing/laughter when the husband is away (1.84);[^6] and lifelong dependence on male protectors (1.85).[^7] These may inform the householder context indirectly, as the householder (*gṛhastha*) is typically married.

If "1.115 area" refers to a different edition's numbering or broader context, no matching prescription appears in searches or statistical wiki layers for this work.[^8]

[^1]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶60edb7](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-60edb7).
[^2]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶47c683](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-47c683).
[^3]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶5fc775](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-5fc775).
[^4]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶c2ffdb](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-c2ffdb).
[^5]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶b3ed86](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-b3ed86).
[^6]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶d35f05](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-d35f05).
[^7]: Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [¶04adc1](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/#p-04adc1).
[^8]: Full Chapter 1 wiki card/sheet; corpus searches for "Yajnavalkya 1.115", "wife/patni duties", etc. (no hits in this work near 1.115). Yājñavalkya Smṛti, ch. 1, [full chapter](/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/01/translation/).
